title: Device Home Screen - Unpair connected Headset
scenario: Verify that unpairing a connected headset via phone Bluetooth settings correctly shows it as disconnected in the app.
steps: Ensure a headset is paired and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open the app and confirm the headset is shown as connected.
Go to the phone's Bluetooth settings.
Unpair (forget) the headset from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
Return to the app and observe the headset status.
expected: The app correctly shows the headset as disconnected.
